bindingContradictions.cause: REAL STALE BINDING caught by the floor: Tag.module.css sets line-height {p.font-line-height-500} (20px) on its own inner .Polaris-Tag__Text span, overriding the carried Text-primitive bodySm chain (16px) the promotion bound; the showcase's verify.ts compared the Text root element, not the inner span the floor names `label` — resolve via the review queue (--to {p.font-line-height-500}; six tokens share the 20px value, so the explicit ref is required)
